params.description: Four equation candidates appear. Three display with product on right (4 × 5 = 20, 5 × 4 = 20, 4 × 5 = 20). One displays with product on left (20 = 4 × 5).

beats.text: Look at the rectangle you built last lesson. Four equations all describe it. Three share a pattern. One breaks it. Which one?
Tap the equation that breaks the pattern, then tap Check.

validator.description: Student tapped the pattern-breaker (product on left)

beats.text: You tapped that one. It looks different from the others. That form is today's topic, and you'll see that it is just as correct as the others. Let's go.
You tapped that one. It looks different from the others. That form is today's topic, and you'll see that it is just as correct as the others. Let's go.

elements.description: Four equation candidates visible. Student has made a selection.
